data.title: Create structural boundary test suite for NextJS Starter documentation artifacts
data.description:
testing_mode: RED

Create tests/skills/test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh with 5 test functions per behavioral testing standard Rule 5 (structural boundary tests for non-executable doc files). All 5 tests fail RED because target files don't exist yet.

Test functions:
1. test_onboarding_doc_exists — asserts test -f docs/onboarding.md
2. test_onboarding_doc_has_bootstrap_section — asserts grep -q 'curl -fsSL' docs/onboarding.md
3. test_readme_exists — asserts test -f plugins/dso/README.md
4. test_readme_has_nextjs_starter_section — asserts grep -qiE 'nextjs-starter|NextJS Starter' plugins/dso/README.md
5. test_claude_md_has_bootstrap_row — asserts grep -q 'Bootstrap' CLAUDE.md

.test-index additions (one name per bracket, one entry per line):
  docs/onboarding.md:tests/skills/test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh [test_onboarding_doc_exists]
  docs/onboarding.md:tests/skills/test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh [test_onboarding_doc_has_bootstrap_section]
  plugins/dso/README.md:tests/skills/test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh [test_readme_exists]
  plugins/dso/README.md:tests/skills/test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh [test_readme_has_nextjs_starter_section]
  CLAUDE.md:tests/skills/test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh [test_claude_md_has_bootstrap_row]

TDD: test file does not exist before this task (RED). After creation, all 5 functions assert on missing files (still RED). Tolerated via RED markers.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Verify: bash -n tests/skills/test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh
- Verify: grep -c 'test_onboarding_doc_exists\|test_onboarding_doc_has_bootstrap_section\|test_readme_exists\|test_readme_has_nextjs_starter_section\|test_claude_md_has_bootstrap_row' tests/skills/test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh | grep -q '[5-9]'
- Verify: grep -c 'test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh' .test-index | grep -q '[5-9]'
- Verify: ! grep -E '\[[a-z_]+,[a-z_]+\]' .test-index
